title: Redsteel Armory
description:
Ever wanted red weapons? well. i hope so.

add awesome weapons with unique textures to minecraft!
(was built to use better combat)
body:
Adds awesome red weapons craftable in survival. comment if something is weird, like a strange name or stuff

Ever wanted red weapons? well. i hope so.

A list of items  in the mod is:

Redsteel. The base item in the mod, used to make just about everything here

Redsteel ore. Comes in three variants, 63 through 0. 0 through -63. and nether. each drop a diffrent versions of the ore.

Birch Stick. The base for all of the weapons in the mod. (Excluding The yamato, alloy scythe and devil sword dante)

Redsteel sword. Basic and reliable blade, flexible for all combat situations.

Redsteel Katana. Faster but doesnt do as much damage. but looks awesome.

Redsteel Scythe. Be the ultimate edgelord with this blade, as well as dealing high damage fast. Or use it as a hoe if you need to farm beetroots. (Beetroot forever :')

Redsteel Dagger. Fast and swift.

Discover the rest in the mod!
